data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for retainage release upon 100% completion.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a retainage release trigger upon 100% completion. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions a retainage release but lacks specific details or evidence to substantiate that the system correctly implements this requirement, leading to an inconclusive validation.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or entities that confirm the implementation of retainage release upon 100% completion.
